skill_text:
A pre-trained Text-to-Speech model for Chinese language using ESPnet framework. It can be used to convert text input into speech output in Chinese. Framework: ESPnet. Functionality: Text-to-Speech. API call: Text2Speech.from_pretrained('espnet/kan-bayashi_csmsc_tts_train_tacotron2_raw_phn_pypinyin_g2p_phone_train.loss.best'). This tool has no required input fields.
When to use:
- Use `espnet__kan_bayashi_csmsc_tts_train_tacotron2_raw_phn_pypinyin_g2p_pho_bd63d581` when the user's request directly matches this tool's purpose.
- This tool has no required input fields.
- Use only when the request clearly needs `espnet__kan_bayashi_csmsc_tts_train_tacotron2_raw_phn_pypinyin_g2p_pho_bd63d581`.
When not to use:
- Do not call this tool when required inputs are missing or ambiguous.
- Do not invent unsupported parameters or unsupported enum values.
- Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
- Do not use for adjacent tools with similar names, descriptions, or arguments.
- Do not use for read/write, search/fetch, create/update, delete/preview, or execute/explain mismatches.
- If the request lacks required fields, abstain or ask for clarification.
